testsuite.system-out: 08:26:21.337 [Test worker] WARN com.sensormonitoring.central.alarm.AlarmService -- ALARM! warehouse 'WH-1' TEMPERATURE sensor 't1' reported 40.0C at 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z which exceeds the configured threshold 08:26:21.454 [Test worker] INFO com.sensormonitoring.central.alarm.AlarmService -- OK: warehouse 'WH-1' HUMIDITY sensor 'h1' = 45.0% at 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z
